title: Energy Manipulation
wikitext:
[[File:Sonic Universe 062-015.png|right|thumb|450px|[[Shadow the Hedgehog (Archie Post-Genesis Wave)|Shadow the Hedgehog]] using Chaos Blast on Black Death.<ref>[[w:c:archiesonic:Archie Sonic Universe Issue 62|Archie Sonic Universe issue #62]]</ref>]]

==Summary==
'''The ability to manipulate energy.''' One of the most ubiquitous and versatile abilities found throughout fiction. It allows use of energy for various purposes, particularly for attack, defense, or improvement of performance. Includes manipulation of both internal and external energy.

==Possible Uses==
*Obtaining [[Superhuman Physical Characteristics|superhuman physical characteristics]] (or imitation thereof)
*[[Forcefield|Barriers]]
*[[Energy Projection|Energy beams]]
*Manipulation of different types of energies (spiritual, magical, thermal, kinetic, etc.)
*Manipulation of the energy of an opponent
*Energy conversion from one form to another (such as thermal to electrical, spiritual into kinetic, etc.)
*Conversion of an energy into [[Matter Manipulation|material objects]]
*Conversion of an energy into [[Information Manipulation|information]]
*Perception of the world outside of the usual five senses, including direct energy sensing of those concealing their presence
*[[Aura|Aura creation]] (explosive, overwhelming, etc.)
*[[Absorption|Energy Absorption]]
*Effects on the [[Mind Manipulation|mind]] and/or [[Soul Manipulation|soul]] of the enemy
*[[Reality Warping]]

==Users==
*[[Son Goku]] and others ([[Dragon Ball]])
*[[Nova (Sam Alexander)|Nova]] ([[Marvel Comics]])
*[[Aang]] ([[Avatar: The Last Airbender]])
*[[Commander Shepard]] ([[Mass Effect]])
*[[Shigeo Kageyama|Mob]] ([[Mob Psycho 100]])
*[[Desiccator]] ([[Dungeons and Dragons]])
*[[Behemoth (Worm)|Behemoth]] ([[Parahumans (Verse)|Parahumans]])
